name: 模特展示 / Model Shot
description: 真人模特展示产品，服装、配饰、穿戴类

defaults.background: clean studio backdrop, solid light gray
defaults.lighting: soft studio key light + fill, 3:1 ratio
defaults.composition: full body, model centered, natural stance

overrides.composition: full body, model standing, feet fully visible, centered
waist-up crop, model facing camera, natural expression
close crop on product area, fabric/texture visible
three-quarter body, model in motion or candid pose
